name: local_contrast_detector
description: Gradient-tolerant binary mask: pixels darker (or brighter) than the local mean by more than C.

params.name: block_radius
params.doc: Box-blur radius used to estimate local background. Should be >> object radius.

params.name: diff_C
params.doc: How many grayscale levels darker (bright_on_dark=false) or brighter (true) than local mean a pixel must be to mark it.

params.name: polarity
params.doc: Which direction the target deviates from background.

outputs.name: mask_mean
outputs.doc: Mean of the mask. Use as a numeric proxy when the JPEG preview of a binary mask is misleading.
